query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_reviews (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractor_abn VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  user_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  quote_id INT,
  rating INT NOT NULL CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),
  accuracy_rating INT CHECK (accuracy_rating >= 1 AND accuracy_rating <= 5),
  compliance_rating INT CHECK (compliance_rating >= 1 AND compliance_rating <= 5),
  communication_rating INT CHECK (communication_rating >= 1 AND communication_rating <= 5),
  review_text TEXT,
  verified_quote BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_contractor_abn (contractor_abn),
  INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
  INDEX idx_quote_id (quote_id)
)

  INDEX idx_contractor_abn (contractor_abn),
